name: Coca-Cola Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chocolate and Coca-Cola in a small saucepan and cook over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and let stand to cool.
3. Refrigerate until cold.
4. Beat the butter until light and fluffy.
5. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Gradually add the chocolate mixture into the butter mixture.
7. Beat in the icing sugar until smooth.
Note: Raw egg yolks can be replaced with an equivalent amount of cake baking powder available in specialty stores.
